entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: The target crop of the study, Arachis hypogaea

entities.name: DROUGHT TOLERANCE
entities.description: The ability of the plant to withstand water-limited conditions

entities.name: IRON DEFICIENCY TOLERANCE
entities.description: The ability of the plant to withstand low iron availability in soil

entities.name: GENOMICS-ASSISTED BREEDING
entities.description: A breeding approach using genomic information to improve crop varieties

entities.name: GENETIC MAP
entities.description: A representation of the relative positions of loci on a chromosome

entities.name: RECOMBINANT INBRED LINE POPULATION
entities.description: A population derived from crossing two distinct lines, used for genetic mapping

entities.name: SNP AXIOM_ARACHIS ARRAY
entities.description: A high-density single nucleotide polymorphism array used for genotyping

entities.name: QTL ANALYSIS
entities.description: Quantitative trait locus analysis used to link phenotypic traits to genomic regions

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: One of the locations where phenotyping data was generated

entities.name: NIGER
entities.description: One of the locations where phenotyping data was generated

entities.name: SENEGAL
entities.description: One of the locations where phenotyping data was generated

entities.name: GENOME-WIDE QTL DISCOVERY ANALYSIS
entities.description: A method to identify QTLs across the entire genome

entities.name: PHENOTYPIC VARIATION EXPLAINED
entities.description: The percentage of phenotypic variance attributed to a specific QTL

entities.name: HAULM WEIGHT
entities.description: A drought tolerance-related trait measuring the weight of the plant stem and leaves

entities.name: SCMR
entities.description: Soil plant analytical development chlorophyll meter reading, a trait related to drought tolerance

entities.name: VISUAL CHLOROSIS RATE
entities.description: A trait used to measure iron deficiency tolerance

entities.name: GLYCOSYL HYDROLASES
entities.description: Candidate genes encoding enzymes that hydrolyze glycosidic bonds

entities.name: MALATE DEHYDROGENASES
entities.description: Candidate genes encoding enzymes involved in the citric acid cycle

entities.name: MICROTUBULE-ASSOCIATED PROTEINS
entities.description: Candidate genes encoding proteins that bind to microtubules

entities.name: TRANSCRIPTION FACTORS
entities.description: Proteins that control the rate of transcription of genetic information from DNA to mRNA

entities.name: MADS-BOX
entities.description: A type of transcription factor involved in developmental processes

entities.name: BHLH
entities.description: Basic helix-loop-helix transcription factors

entities.name: NAC
entities.description: NAM, ATAF, and CUC transcription factors

entities.name: MYB
entities.description: Myeloblastosis transcription factors

entities.name: PLANT GROWTH
entities.description: The biological process of increasing in size or development of the plant

entities.name: SEED AND POD DEVELOPMENT
entities.description: The process of forming seeds and pods in groundnut

entities.name: PHOTOSYNTHESIS
entities.description: The process by which plants use sunlight to synthesize foods

entities.name: DROUGHT
entities.description: A condition of water scarcity affecting plant growth

entities.name: IRON DEFICIENCY
entities.description: A condition where soil lacks sufficient available iron for the plant

entities.name: MOLECULAR MARKERS
entities.description: DNA sequences used to identify specific locations on a chromosome

entities.name: YIELD
entities.description: The total amount of agricultural production per unit area
